message:
Add Series str accessor conformance coverage (lower/upper/capitalize)

Adds harness support for series_str_lower, series_str_upper, and
series_str_capitalize operations with 4 new fixtures. Also includes
rank_pct support and fixes capitalize to match pandas behavior
(lowercase rest of string after first character).

Coverage: 841 fixtures total, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
